globalStyle: YjsE yjse-pixel-v1 opaque side-view pixel art; top-left light; hard two-pixel clusters; no antialiasing, blur, smooth gradients, text, or watermark.
globalNegativePrompt: generic horizontal stripes, bilateral symmetry, evenly spaced repeated forms, soft airbrush, blur, antialiasing, photographic detail, bokeh, text, logo, border, watermark, transparency
globalRequirements: Generate each concept source with the built-in image_gen tool.
Export exactly 512x128 RGBA with alpha fixed to 255.
Preserve hard pixel clusters through a 256x64 logical raster and nearest-neighbor 2x export.
Keep left and right columns byte-identical and make the wrapped horizon, ceiling, floor, and depth planes visually continuous.
Add new versioned IDs and paths; do not redirect or overwrite existing background IDs.

briefs.subject: Temperate forest parallax panorama with mountains, asymmetrical tree groups, ruins, stones, and layered depth.
briefs.prompt: Create an extreme-wide 4:1 horizontally seamless temperate forest panorama for YjsE, substantially richer than a generic striped background. Show clear distant blue-gray mountains, layered misty foothills, mixed deciduous and conifer forest, asymmetrical tree groups, a moss-reclaimed broken stone ruin, standing stones, boulders, and a fallen trunk across at least five readable depth planes. Use crisp hand-authored 16-bit pixel art, deliberate hard clusters, restrained YjsE colors, and top-left light. Keep major landmarks away from the boundaries and make both edges tile continuously. Opaque; no text, watermark, border, blur, antialiasing, gradients, or repeated tree stamps.
requirements: Distant mountains remain clearly readable at native 512x128 scale.
Tree silhouettes vary by species, height, density, and spacing.
Ruin and stone landmarks remain secondary to parallax readability.
Final PNG is opaque, yjse-pixel-v1 palette-only, and horizontal-seam-safe.

briefs.subject: Deep cave parallax panorama with staggered rock arches, stalactites, mushrooms, crystals, and depth fog.
briefs.prompt: Create an extreme-wide 4:1 horizontally seamless deep cave panorama for YjsE, substantially richer than a generic striped background. Build a vast cavern from multiple overlapping chambers, asymmetrically staggered stone arches, broken ledges, readable ceiling stalactites, sparse floor stalagmites, small mushroom clusters, restrained blue-cyan and violet crystals, ancient worn stone fragments, and stepped depth fog across at least five planes. Use crisp hand-authored 16-bit pixel art, deliberate hard clusters, YjsE violet-charcoal cave colors, and top-left ambient light with restrained local accents. Keep unique formations away from the boundaries and make both edges tile continuously. Opaque; no text, watermark, border, blur, antialiasing, smooth gradients, or excessive bloom.
requirements: At least three staggered rock-arch depths remain readable at native scale.
Stalactites avoid uniform spacing and repeated silhouettes.
Mushroom and crystal accents support navigation without dominating the cave palette.
Final PNG is opaque, yjse-pixel-v1 palette-only, and horizontal-seam-safe.
